product.name: Driving School Fleet & Batch Manager
product.tagline: Schedule lessons, track instructor hours, manage vehicle maintenance, and collect fees

sections.problem_statement: Driving school owners in India struggle with manual scheduling leading to instructor under-utilization, missed maintenance cycles for RTO compliance, and fragmented fee collection. Existing generic CRM solutions lack the specific logic for RTO-mandated training hours, vehicle service tracking, and student progress logs. This product centralizes operations to bridge the gap between regulatory compliance and operational efficiency, reducing administrative overhead by 40%.
target_users: Rajesh Sharma, Owner of 'City Drive School', Small-scale urban school: Struggles with manual diary-based scheduling leading to double-booked cars and frustrated students.
Priya Kulkarni, Operations Manager, Mid-sized fleet (20+ cars): Needs to track vehicle service intervals to avoid heavy RTO fines and ensure instructor shift accountability.
Suresh Reddy, Lead Instructor, Multi-branch institute: Faces difficulty tracking individual student training hours (mandatory 20-30 hours) for RTO license processing.
user_stories: As an owner, I want to view a real-time dashboard of instructor availability so that I can maximize fleet utilization during peak evening hours.
As an operations manager, I want to receive automated maintenance alerts based on vehicle mileage so that I avoid vehicle downtime during high-demand seasons.
As a lead instructor, I want to log daily student progress and training hours via mobile so that I can generate RTO-compliant training certificates instantly.
As an owner, I want to integrate UPI payment links into student invoices so that I can reduce cash handling and reconcile payments in real-time.
As a student, I want to receive SMS/WhatsApp reminders for my upcoming driving slots so that I don't miss training sessions and incur penalty fees.
mvp_features: Smart Scheduler: Drag-and-drop interface for mapping students to instructors and vehicles, preventing double-bookings.
Compliance Ledger: Digital logbook tracking cumulative training hours per student to ensure adherence to Motor Vehicles Act requirements.
Fleet Health Monitor: Automated service reminders based on kilometer logs to ensure safety and RTO compliance.
UPI-Integrated Billing: Automated invoicing with dynamic QR codes for seamless payment tracking via Razorpay or Cashfree.
Instructor Portal: Mobile-optimized interface for instructors to mark attendance and update session status in real-time.
Automated Notifications: WhatsApp and SMS reminders for students regarding upcoming lessons and pending fee installments.
future_features: RTO Document Automation: Direct API integration to fetch student license status and auto-fill RTO forms.
Telematics Integration: IoT device support to track real-time vehicle location and harsh braking data for driver assessment.
AI Route Optimizer: Suggesting the best training routes to save fuel costs based on traffic patterns.
Parent/Guardian Dashboard: For schools focusing on teen drivers, providing progress visibility and safety reports.
success_metrics: Fleet Utilization Rate: Increase from 60% to 85% within 6 months — proves operational efficiency and revenue growth.
Payment Reconciliation Time: Reduce from 5 days to <1 hour within 3 months — measures the impact of integrated digital payments.
Maintenance Compliance: 100% of vehicles serviced on time by month 4 — ensures zero RTO-related service fines.
Churn Rate: Below 5% annually for paying subscribers — indicates high product stickiness and value delivery.
assumptions: Driving schools have at least one smartphone-literate manager who can handle digital dashboards.
WhatsApp Business API is the primary communication channel preferred by Indian customers.
Schools are willing to move from cash-heavy operations to digital ledger systems for better transparency.
risks: High resistance to digital adoption among veteran instructors → Mitigation: Gamify the instructor portal with simple UI and performance rewards.
Data privacy concerns under DPDP Act → Mitigation: Implement role-based access control (RBAC) and data encryption at rest.
Regulatory changes in RTO policies → Mitigation: Modular architecture allowing for rapid updates to training hour logic and reporting.
sections.go_to_market: Launch via direct sales partnerships with local RTO agents and driving school associations in Tier 2 cities. Utilize a 'freemium' model for the first 100 schools, offering white-glove onboarding and data migration support. Scale through referral programs where existing school owners earn discounts for onboarding other fleet operators.
sections.tech_stack_suggestion: Use a no-code backend like Bubble.io or FlutterFlow for rapid prototyping and mobile-first experience. Integrate with Razorpay for payment processing and Twilio/Interakt for automated WhatsApp messaging. Use PostgreSQL for relational data mapping of students to vehicles and instructors.
sections.monetisation: Tiered SaaS subscription: 'Starter' at ₹1,999/month (up to 3 cars), 'Growth' at ₹4,999/month (up to 10 cars), and 'Enterprise' at ₹9,999+ (unlimited). The model focuses on flat recurring revenue to ensure predictability for small businesses. Expansion revenue will come from add-on modules like telematics and RTO document processing services.
